rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE JAMES JOHNSON, SR REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Substitute Personal Representative In Place Of Deceased Petitioner Lamerle R Johnson
rulings.Rulings: Motion to Substitute Personal Representative in Place of Petitioner is granted. Danielle Martin Johnson, having been appointed the late Lamerle Johnson's personal representative by the Superior Court of Alameda County, may amend Petition Concerning Internal Affairs of the Trust currently set to be heard by this Court on July 9, 2018 to substitute herself in place of Mr. Johnson as the petitioner in her capacity as Mr. Johnson's personal representative. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Tuesday, May 22, 2018.
